description: Alerts should be set up to notify administrators of abnormal system behavior or performance issues
Users can use our script maker to generate a script that can be used to make a long story video, the script also can be saved to be used later
The user shall be able to Sign Up on the system
The user shall be able to enter a script to the system to generate a long video or film
The user shall be able to select the voice over of the characters and the music of the video
The user shall be able to remove his account from the system
The user shall be able to logout of the system
The user shall be able to login to the system using his account
The user shall be able to view history of the input prompt or script
The user shall be able to edit his account
The user shall be able to create a video from the history of the input prompt or script
The user shall be able to view the generated video
The user shall be able to enter a simple prompt to the system to create a small video
The user shall be able to edit on the generated video
